texto: So I can curse my pain all I want. I can try to leave it at the door. But maybe I should say grace, gnaw on its bones and thank it for nourishment instead. Maybe for now it's what's keeping me alive. And for now, I can accept living out of spite.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Little Bear the Bearded Lady sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “So I can curse my pain all I want. I can try to leave it at the door. But maybe I should say grac…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, acceptance, life-lesson, útil em momentos de life-lesson e pain.
